name: Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour and baking powder.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter and sugar mixture, alternating with milk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture.
5. Fold in mashed bananas until just combined.
6. Grease and flour three 9-inch round cake pans.
7. Pour batter into prepared pans.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 25-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cakes to cool completely before frosting.
10. Frost between layers and on sides with cream cheese frosting once cooled.
